summary: Testing iteration 19 - Dark Minimalist Design verification. All design requirements verified: dark background, red accent color throughout, sidebar tabs with hover/active red states, Quick Tips using red. ISSUE: shadcn/ui Button component has 8px border-radius instead of square corners (0-4px). Custom-styled buttons are square but Button component is rounded.

ui_bugs.issue: Border-radius is 8px instead of square (0-4px). The button.jsx uses 'rounded-md' Tailwind class. User requires 'All corners must be square/boxy, not rounded'.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Update /app/frontend/src/components/ui/button.jsx - change 'rounded-md' to 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm' (which maps to 2px via --radius)

ui_bugs.issue: Button uses purple color instead of red accent. Visible on Campaign Dashboard Setting tab.
ui_bugs.selector: GENERATE IDEAS button in ROOK section
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Change button background from purple to red (#DC2626)

OPTIONAL: Change GENERATE IDEAS button from purple to red to match design system

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark minimalist design verified. All accent colors now use red (#DC2626). Sidebar tabs work correctly with hover (red bar) and active (full red) states. Main issue: shadcn/ui Button component still has 8px border-radius - needs to be updated to square corners. The --radius CSS variable in index.css is 0.625rem (10px) while App.css uses --radius-sm: 2px for square corners.
